userText: I need put an new learning approch in place right now.
correctedText: I need to put a new learning approach in place right now.
generalAdvice: 短语和意思都答对了，句子骨架也对。三个小问题：need 后面要加 to，an 要改成 a，approach 拼写要检查。

issues.note: need 后面要接不定式 to + 动词，不能直接跟动词原形：I need to put，不是 I need put。
issues.suggestion: 把 need to do 当成一个固定骨架整体记住。

issues.note: new 以辅音音素开头，所以是 a new，不是 an new。
issues.suggestion: an 用在元音音素开头的词前：an hour, an idea, an approach；a 用在辅音音素前：a new, a plan, a system。

issues.note: approch 拼写错误，应为 approach。
